subcodes.first_line: I swear by the Sun of Truth which hath shone forth from the horizon of the Will of God, glorified be His majesty, that none in this Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قسم بافتاب حقیقت که از افق اراده حق جل جلاله اشراق نموده احدی در این امر
subcodes.subjects: @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
